steps.title: Identify the plural noun form needed
steps.content: The blank requires a possessive noun phrase. The noun is nanoparticles in its plural form, and we need to show that the properties belong to it.

steps.title: Apply the plural possessive rule
steps.content: For a regular plural noun ending in -s, the possessive is formed by adding an apostrophe only (no additional s): nanoparticles' properties. Choice A incorrectly adds a second apostrophe to properties, choice B omits the apostrophe entirely, and choice D uses the singular possessive form. That matches choice C — C is correct.
